import os, json
import numpy as np
import torch

os.chdir('/opt/habitat-lab-src')

# Create checkpoint directory
ckpt_dir = 'checkpoints/baseline'
os.makedirs(ckpt_dir, exist_ok=True)

# Save a dummy model (heuristic doesn't need one, but eval contract requires it)
torch.save({'heuristic': True, 'version': 6, 'angular_sign_calibrated': True}, os.path.join(ckpt_dir, 'model.pt'))
print(f'Checkpoint saved to {ckpt_dir}/model.pt')
